prompt: Review PR #4500 in DataDog/dd-trace-go. It adds service override source tracking (_dd.svc_src).

assertions.text: Flags hardcoded tag strings and recommends importing from ddtrace/ext or instrumentation
Notes inconsistency in how service source is set across different contrib integrations
Flags values placed in shared instrumentation package that are too specific to one integration
Suggests reusing existing constants or patterns (like componentName) instead of creating new strings
